content.text:
Answer (no colon counted, only digits in HHMM):

- Total times: 24 hours × 60 minutes = 1440, so total digits = 1440 × 4 = 5760.

Digit frequencies (across all four positions):
- 0: 1164
- 1: 1164
- 2: 804
- 3: 564
- 4: 504
- 5: 504
- 6: 264
- 7: 264
- 8: 264
- 9: 264

Most common digits: 0 and 1 (tie), each appearing 1164 times ≈ 20.21% of all digits.

Rarest digits: 6, 7, 8, and 9 (tie), each appearing 264 times ≈ 4.58% of all digits.

Brief note on method: counted digit occurrences separately for hour tens (H1), hour units (H2), minute tens (M1), and minute units (M2), then summed.
